title: A Visionary Architect's Humble Beginnings
story: Louis Kahn, the brilliant mind behind the Salk Institute, began his journey in 1901. Born on December 20 in Pärnu, Estonia, Kahn would grow up to revolutionize modern architecture. His unique designs blended light, space, and materials in ways that still inspire today. Kahn's work continues to shape how we think about buildings and their impact on our lives.
activity_question: What famous building did Louis Kahn design?
follow_up_question: Can you name another famous architect?
